decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to quickly build a board presence with aggressive creatures such as Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, and Guide of Souls, while using cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Goblin Bombardment to deal direct damage to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Arena of Glory and Voice of Victory to boost the power of your creatures and ensure victory in combat. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, aggressive plays and efficient removal spells.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to overwhelm the opponent. It also includes cards like Goblin Bombardment and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to deal direct damage. The deck uses cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah for additional support and disruption, while cards like Voice of Victory provide a power boost. With a mix of efficient creature spells and support cards, this deck aims to end the game quickly by putting pressure on the opponent and controlling the board.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. The deck includes powerful cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah, backed up by support cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Seasoned Pyromancer. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Goblin Bombardment and Thraben Charm to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and close out the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly generate mana through rituals and cards like Ruby Medallion, then use that mana to cast spells like Glimpse the Impossible and Reckless Impulse to draw into combo pieces. Ral, Monsoon Mage is used for card advantage and burn damage, while Past in Flames can help to recur key spells. Wrenn's Resolve can protect your combo pieces and ensure they resolve. With the right cards in hand, you can use Wish to search for a specific piece needed to go off and win the game.

The main idea of this deck is to assemble a toolbox of creatures using the combo of Devoted Druid and Vizier of Remedies to generate infinite mana. This mana can then be used to search for or play powerful creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth or Walking Ballista, overwhelming the opponent with a large board presence. Leyline of Abundance helps to ramp up mana production while cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Duskwatch Recruiter aid in finding the necessary pieces for the combo. Overall, the deck focuses on efficient creature based combos to quickly win the game.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on disrupting opponent's strategies through counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage. By utilizing cards like Counterspell, Fatal Push, and Cling to Dust, the deck aims to control the game by managing the board state and preventing key spells from resolving. The deck also includes ways to generate card advantage with cards like Consult the Star Charts and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian. Overall, the deck aims to outlast and outvalue the opponent, making use of efficient spells and strategic decision-making to come out on top.

This deck prioritizes early aggression and disruption through a combination of aggressive creatures like Siren Stormtamer and Cecil, Dark Knight, along with removal spells like Fatal Push. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Force of Negation and Seal of Removal to control the game. Lazav, the Multifarious and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares provide additional versatility and power to the deck. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly while maintaining control of the game through disruption and versatile threats.

This deck focuses on utilizing the Living End mechanic to return creatures from the graveyard to the battlefield, while disrupting the opponent's strategy with counter spells and creature removal. The deck includes a variety of creatures with relevant abilities to pressure the opponent while controlling the board state. The deck also utilizes cards that can cycle for additional value and a variety of lands to ensure the right mana base. Overall, the deck aims to efficiently combo off and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game using the powerful UrzaTron lands to generate massive amounts of mana. You will use cards like Ugin, Karn, and Thought-Knot Seer to disrupt your opponent's strategy while also presenting threats of your own with creatures like Devourer of Destiny and Ulamog. The deck also utilizes powerful Eldrazi spells to maintain board presence and close out the game quickly. By effectively managing your resources and disrupting your opponent's plans, you can dominate the battlefield and secure victory.

The deck focuses on assembling the UrzaTron lands to generate a large amount of colorless mana quickly. It utilizes powerful Eldrazi creatures and control cards to disrupt the opponent's strategy while also applying pressure. Karn, the Great Creator is utilized to search for key artifacts to further enhance the control aspect of the deck. The main goal is to overwhelm the opponent with large threats, disruption, and efficient mana production to secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with a swarm of low-cost artifacts and creatures, taking advantage of affinity mechanics to power out threats early. Tormod's Crypt and Basim Ibn Ishaq provide disruption and removal, while Urza's Saga and Mox Opal help generate mana and card advantage. The combination of Cranial Plating, Pinnacle Emissary, and Kappa Cannoneer allows for explosive damage output, while Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card selection and advantage. By efficiently utilizing artifacts and creatures, this deck aims to apply pressure and quickly close out games before opponents can stabilize.

This deck focuses on utilizing Leyline of the Guildpact to reduce the cost of multicolored spells and maximize the value of Scion of Draco and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury. The deck also includes aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Territorial Kavu to apply early pressure on the opponent. Stubborn Denial and Lightning Bolt provide interaction and removal, while Arena of Glory and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker offer additional support and utility. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of powerful creatures and efficient spells.

The main concept of this deck revolves around assembling the UrzaTron lands to generate massive amounts of mana to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures and control spells. The deck aims to disrupt opponents with cards like Thought-Knot Seer and Karn, the Great Creator, while utilizing Ugin, the Spirit Dragon and All Is Dust to clear the board and maintain control. The inclusion of Mind Stone and Expedition Map helps to ramp up mana quickly, while cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Dismember provide additional removal options.

This deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly and efficiently to play big threats like Primeval Titan and abuse the powerful land combo with Amulet of Vigor. It utilizes lands like Gruul Turf and Simic Growth Chamber to generate extra mana and repeatable land drops. The deck also includes cards like Arboreal Grazer and Crumbling Vestige to further accelerate mana production. The ultimate goal is to quickly assemble the Amulet Titan combo and overwhelm the opponent with powerful plays and overwhelming board presence.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifact creatures and artifacts to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. By combining efficient artifact creatures like Memnite and Arcbound Ravager with powerful artifacts like Engineered Explosives and Urza's Saga, the deck aims to quickly establish board presence and pressure the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble helps to ramp up and maintain consistency in the early game, while disruptive cards like Pithing Needle and Sink into Stupor help to disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures and control the game with removal spells and disruptive effects. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with big threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Sire of Seven Deaths, while also disrupting their game plan with cards like Ghost Quarter and Bojuka Bog. The deck also includes cards like Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command to control the board and Ugin, Eye of the Storms for additional removal and card advantage. The overall strategy is to outvalue the opponent with big threats and efficient removal spells.
